title: Farmer's 3D
body:
## 📖 **About** 📖 **Resource pack to change foods added in [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight) to 3D**

![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/KDlvLKVH/images/7a7a9aed466985d8c8379d496e78fb4fe262ee12.png) [![modrinth-gallery](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/documentation/modrinth-gallery_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/farmers-3d/gallery)

## 🎨 Select Decoration Type 🎨 **The file you should download depends on what you want to decorate the item on.**

**1. Normal (Download the file with "Normal" in the file name)** ![normal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/KDlvLKVH/images/3cc1e261900a629dfddc365becd98d92623ac872.png)

**2. Cutting Board version (Download the file with "CB" in the file name)** ![cb](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/KDlvLKVH/images/50a2bece51175013cecaedd20508ed04f7a4f7a5.png)

## 🔎 Supported Items 🔎
v1.0 beta1 or above - farmersdelight: - ham - beef_patty - hamburger - melon_popsicle - fried_egg - cake_slice - kelp_roll - kelp_roll_slice - salmon_roll - cod_roll - rice_roll_medley_block - shepherds_pie_block - honey_glazed_ham_block - stuffed_pumpkin_block - roast_chicken_block
v1.0 beta2 or above - farmersdelight: - noodle_soup - beef_stew - cooked_rice - smoked_ham - steak_and_potatoes
v1.0 beta3 or above - farmersdelight: - bacon - cooked_bacon - dog_food - horse_feed - glow_berry_custard
v1.0 beta4 or above - farmersdelight: - mutton_chop - cooked_mutton_chop - fruit_salad - dumplings - pie_crust - apple_pie - sweet_berry_cheesecake - chocolate_pie
v1.0 beta5 or above - farmersdelight: - apple_pie_slice - sweet_berry_cheesecake_slice - chocolate_pie_slice


## 💡 Tips 💡 1. **If you want to place a 3D item on the table, you can use [toggle item frames](https://modrinth.com/mod/toggle-item-frames) or similar to make the item frame invisible.**

## ✅ Supported Minecraft Version ✅ - [**1.20.1**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/farmers-3d/versions?g=1.20.1) - [**1.19.2**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/farmers-3d/versions?g=1.19.2) - [**1.18.2**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/farmers-3d/versions?g=1.18.2) - [**1.16.5**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/farmers-3d/versions?g=1.16.5)

--- [![curseforge](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/curseforge_vector.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/farmers-3d) [![modrinth](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/modrinth_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/farmers-3d)
